Chapter 8 – Newfoundland and Labrador

Newfoundland and Labrador provincial tax

Table – Newfoundland and Labrador provincial tax rates
Annual net income (A) ($) Provincial tax rate (R) Annual constant (K) ($)
0.00 to 43,198.00 8.70% 0.00
43,198.01 to 86,395.00 14.50% 2,505.00
More than 86,395.00 15.80% 3,629.00
Table 8.14 Newfoundland and Labrador claim codes
Claim code Total claim amount ($) from Total claim amount ($) to Option 1, TCP ($) Option 1, K1P ($)
0 No claim amount No claim amount 0.00 0.00
1 0.00 10,900.00 10,900.00 948.30
2 10,900.01 13,000.00 11,950.00 1,039.65
